docs.description: Composable placeholder content for empty views with centered and inline layout variants. Size propagates to all parts via context; variant controls root layout only.

anatomy.name: EmptyState
anatomy.note: Root wrapper — provides size context to all parts. Variant controls root layout only.

anatomy.name: EmptyStateIcon
anatomy.note: Optional visual marker. Size adapts via context.

anatomy.name: EmptyStateMessage
anatomy.note: Primary empty-state copy. Font size adapts via context.

anatomy.name: EmptyStateDescription
anatomy.note: Secondary supporting copy. Font size adapts via context.

anatomy.name: EmptyStateActions
anatomy.note: Optional action area for buttons/links. Gap adapts via context.

notes.title: Layout Variants
notes.content: centered variant for full-page empty states, inline variant for embedded contexts.

notes.title: Size
notes.content: sm for compact embedded contexts, md (default) for standard use, lg for full-page empty states. Size propagates to all parts via context.

notes.title: Compound Composition
notes.content: Compose semantic parts for icon, message, description, and actions. All parts consume size from the root via React context. Variant controls root layout only.

notes.title: Accessibility
notes.content: For empty states that appear dynamically (e.g., after filtering returns no results), set live on the root. This adds role="status" and aria-live="polite" so screen readers announce the change.
